ideation: This animation sequence depicts the act of connecting two things, mirroring the visual of a link. It starts with the arms at rest, then moves to a position where the hands reach forward, as if grasping two ends.  The hands then come together, simulating the joining, and finally the arms settle into a position holding the linked item. The left arm will primarily do the reaching and the right arm will mostly be a counterpoint.  I'll make sure the movements are fluid and natural, avoiding any jerky motions.

frames.beat: arms hang relaxed, ready to connect
hands reach out, grasping opposite ends
the two ends meet and join together
arms hold the connected link, steady and settle
